zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield於1581年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安阿米斯費爾德時，她的父親John Charteris13歲，母親Lady Margaret Fleming11歲。她於1599年5月30日與Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾吉可馬結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Charteris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: from the city of Chartres in N France; see Charters .

variants.name: Charters
meanings: Scottish (Kirkcudbrightshire) and northern English: habitational name of Norman origin from the French city of Chartres, named for a Gaulish tribe, recorded in Latin sources as the Carnutes, whose seat it was.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield was born in 1581, in Amisfield, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Charteris, was 13 and her mother, Lady Margaret Fleming, was 11. She married Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick on 30 May 1599, in Kirkmahoe, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters.

Elle a épousé Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick le 30 mai 1599, à Kirkmahoe, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles.

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield(이)가 1581년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 아미스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Charteris(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Fleming(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1599년 5월 30일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 커크마호에서 Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield родилась в 1581 г. в местности амисфиелд, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Charteris было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Fleming, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick 30 мая 1599 г. в местности киркмахо, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей.
